task: Check whether a structured rubric contract is complete before scoring candidate answers.

dimensions.name: Correctness
dimensions.why_it_matters: The scoring rubric needs a correctness dimension.

dimensions.name: Constraint Compliance
dimensions.why_it_matters: The output must respect task constraints.
dimensions.pass_boundary: The output respects all major constraints.
dimensions.partial_boundary: The output misses a minor constraint.
dimensions.fail_boundary: The output misses a major constraint.

dimensions.name: Evidence Quality
dimensions.why_it_matters: Claims should be grounded in evidence.
